bracu_official.title: BRAC University IEEE society hosts seminar on careers in big tech and AI startups
bracu_official.summary: The BRAC University IEEE society is organizing a seminar to explore career opportunities within big tech and AI startups. This event is scheduled for July 16, 2026, at 6:00 pm.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University and Sporsho Braille Foundation visit Baptist Mission Integrated School
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University collaborated with the Sporsho Braille Foundation for a visit to the Baptist Mission Integrated School. This community outreach occurred on July 15, 2026, at 4:30 pm.

bracu_official.title: Argentine ambassador joins BRAC University students to watch World Cup quarter-final match
bracu_official.summary: The Argentine ambassador participated in an event with BRAC University students to watch his home team's World Cup quarter-final match on July 15, 2026, at 4:00 pm.

bracu_official.title: Public Reporting on Contract Signing – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD2
bracu_official.summary: Public reporting has been released concerning the contract signing for project B-113, specifically related to ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD2.

bracu_official.summary: Public reporting has been released concerning the contract signing for project B-113, specifically related to ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD1.

bracu_official.title: UG "Wishlist" Event Schedule, Fall 2026
bracu_official.summary: The schedule for the Undergraduate "Wishlist" event, set to take place in Fall 2026, has been announced.

bracu_official.title: Notice of Award – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-2
bracu_official.summary: An official notice of award has been issued for the project designated as B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-2.

bracu_official.summary: An important academic notice regarding the schedule for final examinations occurring in December.

bracu_official.title: Final Examinations for September
bracu_official.summary: An important academic notice regarding the schedule for final examinations occurring in September.

bracu_official.title: University Closed for Eid-e-Miladun Nabi
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University will observe a closure on August 26th in commemoration of Eid-e-Miladun Nabi.

bracu_official.title: July Mass Uprising Day
bracu_official.summary: An announcement related to the observance of July Mass Uprising Day.
